creator: christos@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Sean Farley from comment #16)
Installing those two ports fixes this issue for me as well.

In case this is of interest:

$ pkg info shotcut
shotcut-22.06.23_2
Name           : shotcut
Version        : 22.06.23_2
Installed on   : Wed May 14 16:41:56 2025 CEST
Origin         : multimedia/shotcut
Architecture   : FreeBSD:14:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : multimedia
Licenses       : GPLv3
Maintainer     : vishwin@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : https://shotcut.org/
Comment        : Free, open source, cross-platform video editor
Options        :
        FREI0R         : on
        LADSPA         : on
        NLS            : on
Shared Libs required:
        libQt5Core.so.5
        libQt5Gui.so.5
        libQt5Multimedia.so.5
        libQt5Network.so.5
        libQt5OpenGL.so.5
        libQt5Qml.so.5
        libQt5QmlModels.so.5
        libQt5Quick.so.5
        libQt5QuickControls2.so.5
        libQt5QuickWidgets.so.5
        libQt5Sql.so.5
        libQt5WebSockets.so.5
        libQt5Widgets.so.5
        libQt5Xml.so.5
        libc++.so.1
        libc.so.7
        libcxxrt.so.1
        libfftw3.so.3
        libgcc_s.so.1
        libm.so.5
        libmlt++-7.so.7
        libmlt-7.so.7
Shared Libs provided:
        libCuteLogger.so
Annotations    :
        FreeBSD_version: 1402000
        build_timestamp: 2025-05-11T08:40:09+0000
        built_by       : poudriere-git-3.4.2-12-g74a54a88
        cpe            : cpe:2.3:a:meltytech:shotcut:22.06.23:::::freebsd14:x64:2
        port_checkout_unclean: no
        port_git_hash  : 1bb147345d
        ports_top_checkout_unclean: no
        ports_top_git_hash: 325eeb2b11
        repo_type      : binary
        repository     : FreeBSD
Flat size      : 12.1MiB
Description    :
Shotcut is a free, open source, cross-platform video editor for
Windows, Mac and Linux. Major features include support for a wide
range of formats; no import required meaning native timeline editing;
Blackmagic Design support for input and preview monitoring; and
resolution support to 4k.
